UG-120  DATA REPORTS. (a) The Manufacturer shall complete a data report form for each pressure vessel. The data report shall contain the information as required by this paragraph. (b) Information shall include design conditions in accordance with UG-22, wall thickness calculations as required by UG-27, test results in accordance with UG-99, except as permitted by UG-100 for pneumatic tests, and material specifications per UG-80. (c) The data report shall be signed by the Manufacturer and countersigned by the Inspector as required by UG-117. Copies shall be retained in accordance with UG-93. Markings shall comply with UG-116. See also UG-94 for general reporting.
